name: penny-plugin
display_name: Penny — AI Bookkeeper for QuickBooks Online
description: Penny is an AI-powered bookkeeper that connects directly to QuickBooks Online. Ask in plain English to pull reports, review transactions, create invoices, track expenses, and more. Includes guided onboarding from zero to live connection.
author: MyBusinessGenie

skills.name: penny-onboarding
skills.description: Full zero-to-live setup — creates Intuit developer app, guides through approval, connects to Cowork, and verifies live QBO data. Start here if you're brand new.

skills.name: setup-penny
skills.description: Quick reconnect and troubleshooting for clients who already have Intuit credentials.
